word: G3836 - πανταχόθεν - pantachóthen - pan-takh-oth'-en - From every quarter

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πανταχόθεν

- Transliteration: Pantachothen

- Phonetic: pan-takh-oth'-en

- Definition:

1. from all sides, from every quarter

- Origin: adverb (of source) from G3837

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb (of source) from G3837; from all directions: - from every quarter.
